name: TowerHex
short_description: Set out on a magical virtual reality quest and explore the fantasy world of TowerHex. Open some portals, kill some dragons, become the hero and find the missing alchemist!
detailed_description:
TowerHex is a virtual reality escape game where you and your team set out on a quest to find a missing alchemist. He disappeared while investigating an ancient ritual on crystal energy. Following his footsteps, you will have to climb old castle ruins inside a lava mountain. To get ahead you will have to solve various puzzles and learn to use crystal energy for teleportation. There are also dragons.

Game Features

* Designed for room scale VR
* Suitable for multiplayer
* 11 rooms and only 1 hour until time runs out
* Magical atmosphere in a fantasy environment
* Beautiful graphics and immersive VR gameplay
* Various interesting mechanisms and well-designed puzzles throughout the story
* Simple controls - one button for overall intuitive gameplay and one button for teleportation

Game is built for everyone between age of 10 and 99 without any VR or HTC Vive experience.
